
---
title: "Which Came First: Consciousness or Life?"
author: "Noushin Nabavi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [references.bib]
link-citations: yes
---

# Preface {-}

This book explores scientific, philosophical, and metaphysical theories concerning the relationship between life and consciousness.
